cooldown_messages: I may have a lot of stamina but you gotta give me {remaining} to catch my breath!
Hold on, I'm still recovering from our last flirt! {remaining} left before I'm ready again.
Even I need a moment to recharge my flirt batteries! {remaining} until I'm back at full power.
Patience, darling! {remaining} until I'm ready to sweep you off your feet again.
I'm still basking in the afterglow of our last flirt! {remaining} until I'm ready for round two.
Astarte said I was being to flirty. Give me {remaining} to calm down.
Anubis was getting mad that I was flirting too much. {remaining} until I'm back in his good graces.
Bast said I was being too spicy. {remaining} until I can go back to being her sweet kitty.
Hathor said I was being too romantic. {remaining} until she leaves me alone.
